name: Fishing Cat
short_description: A cat that was chased away from the fish market dreams of opening its own fish shop. Catch fish by fishing to gather funds. Help the cat open a fish shop where it can happily eat with its friends without being scolded. Mrrrow!
detailed_description:
Game Description


The cat, chased away from the fish market, dreams of opening its own fish shop. Catch fish by fishing to gather funds. To open the fish shop faster, you can catch fish together with friends. Help the cat open a fish shop where it can happily eat with its friends without being scolded. Help your feline friend open their very own fish shop right now!

Features


  • Cute 2D Fishing Game: Enjoy a game filled with adorable animations.
  • Simple and Casual: Easy to play, suitable for everyone.
  • Open a Fish Shop: Join cute cat friends to start your own fish shop.
